explanation_used:
1. **Opening statement**: This neuron strongly responds to **political or organizational power dynamics and authoritative actions** (such as legislative maneuvers, party conflicts, government statements, military/defense spending, or institutional decisions).

2. **Domain coverage**: The pattern appears across multiple languages (English, Spanish, Arabic, Hindi, etc.) and contexts, including international relations (e.g., Russia-U.S. policy, Rohingya crisis), domestic politics (e.g., BJP actions, North Carolina legislative session), disaster/emergency management (hurricane impacts, power outages), and organizational authority (cricket board disputes, Disney leadership). It activates on texts where individuals or groups exert, challenge, or describe formal power.

3. **Contrast with low-activation examples**: The high-activation texts consistently feature explicit references to authoritative entities (governments, parties, leaders, institutions) and actions involving control, conflict, or policy. The low-activation examples are either neutral factual statements (dates, locations, personal stories) or descriptive snippets without this dimension of power exertion or institutional conflict.

4. **Closing interpretation**: The neuron detects linguistic markers of institutional authority, political contention, and decisive actions within structured organizations. It appears to fire on text where power is being exercised, debated, or reported in formal societal contexts.

results.plain_text: ''എന്തുകൊണ്ട് ആ മുറിയില്‍ സ്ത്രീകളില്ല'': മോദിയെ കുഴപ്പിച്ച് ദിയ മിര്‍സ  തന്റെ രാഷ്ട്രിയ ജീവിതത്തിലെ വിഷയങ്ങള്‍ സോഷ്യല്‍ മീഡിയയിലൂടെ പങ്കുവെയ്ക്കുന്നതില്‍ ശ്രദ്ധ പുലര്‍ത്തുന്നയാളാണ് പ്രധാനമന്ത്രി നരേന്ദ്ര മോദി. എന്നാല്‍ പുതുതായി പങ്കുവെച്ച ചിത്രത്തില്‍ ചോദ്യമുന്നയിച്ച് രംഗത്ത് വന്നിരിക്കുകയാണ് ബോളിവുഡ് നടി ദിയ മിര്‍സ മുംബൈയിലെ രാജ്ഭവനില്‍ വച്ച് കഴിഞ്ഞ ചൊവ്വാഴ്ച പ്രധാനമന്ത്രി നരേന്ദ്ര മോദി ബോളിവുഡ് നടന്മാരുമായും നിര്‍മാതാക്കളുമായുള്ള ചര്‍ച്ച സംഘടിപ്പിച്ചിരുന്നു. സിനിമ മേഖലയിലെ പ്രശ്‌നങ്ങള്‍ ചര്‍ച്ച ചെയ്യാനാണ് ഇതെന്നാണ് പുറത്ത് വരുന്ന റിപ്പോര്‍ട്ടുകള്‍. ചര്‍ച്ചയുടെ ചിത്രങ്ങള്‍ പുറത്ത് വന്നതോടെ വലിയ വിവാദങ്ങള്‍ക്കാണ് വഴി തുറന്നിരിക്കുന്നത്. എന്ത് കൊണ്ടാണ് ഇത്തരം ചര്‍ച്ചയില്‍ ഒരു സ്ത്രീയെ പോലും ഉള്‍പ്പെടുത്തിയില്ലെന്ന ചോദ്യമാണ് സോഷ്യല്‍ മീഡിയയില്‍ നിന്നും ഉയര്‍ന്നു വരുന്നത്. ചര്‍ച്ചയുടെ ചിത്രം ട്വീറ്റ് ചെയ്ത ദിയ മിര്‍സ 'ആ മുറിയില്‍ ഒരു സ്ത്രീയില്ലാത്തതിന് പിന്നില്‍ എന്താണ് കാരണമെന്ന്' ചോദ്യമുയര്‍ത്തി.  നിര്‍മാതാക്കളായ റിതേഷ് സിദ്‌വാനി, കരണ്‍ ജോഹര്‍, രാകേഷ് റോഷന്‍, റോണി സ്‌ക്രൂീവാല, പ്രസൂണ്‍ ജോഷി, സി.ബി.എഫ്.സി ചെയര്‍മാന്‍ സിദ്ധാര്‍ഥ് റോയ് കപൂര്‍, അക്ഷയ് കുമാര്‍,അജയ് ദേവ്ഗണ്‍ തുടങ്ങിയവരാണ് ചര്‍ച്ചയില്‍ പങ്കെടുത്തത്. നടന്‍ അക്ഷയ് കുമാര്‍ മോദിയുമായി നടത്തിയ കൂടിക്കാഴ്ചയുടെ ചിത്രം ട്വീറ്റ് ചെയ്തിരുന്നു. ContentHighlights: Diya mirza tweet about narendra modi discussion, narendra modi, diya mirza, akshay kumar,modi conducted discusson with film crew members

results.actual_text: os los nuevos modelos Echo Dot y Echo Dot con reloj. Una de las actualizaciones más notables es Eero Built-in
results.plain_text: Durante el evento de hardware de Amazon, la compañía anunció nuevos dispositivos Echo con tecnología de Alexa, incluidos los nuevos modelos Echo Dot y Echo Dot con reloj.         Una de las actualizaciones más notables es Eero Built-in para Echo Dot, que permite que los dispositivos Echo Dot funcionen como extensores de Wi-Fi para las redes Eero existentes.  Leer también: El perro alarma sísmica es la estrella de TikTok      El Echo Studio, que ahora viene en un nuevo color, Glacier White, no está obteniendo mejoras a nivel de hardware. En cambio, una actualización por aire traerá la tecnología de procesamiento de audio espacial que se basa en el audio 3D de Amazon a los dispositivos Echo Studio existentes, diseñados para ofrecer una mayor “anchura” y claridad que el audio estéreo estándar.       La tecnología de extensión de rango de frecuencia del altavoz inteligente, otra nueva incorporación a través del nuevo software próximo, aparentemente ofrece un mejor rendimiento de reproducción al mejorar la claridad y la profundidad del rango medio. el bajo.        En cuanto al Echo Dot actualizado, que cuenta con nuevo hardware, tiene una arquitectura rediseñada que introduce un altavoz más grande en una carcasa del mismo tamaño que la generación anterior, lo que genera voces más claras y el doble de graves.      Una pantalla mejorada, más brillante y de mayor resolución en el modelo Echo Dot with Clock muestra más información, incluida la hora. Y los nuevos sensores (un acelerómetro y un sensor de temperatura) y el procesador de borde neural AZ2 de Amazon permiten cosas como más controles de gestos táctiles (p. ej., tocar la parte superior del dispositivo para pausar y reiniciar la música, detener un temporizador o finalizar una llamada), pedirle a Alexa la temperatura ambiente y activando rutinas basadas en la temperatura.       El nuevo Echo Dot también es el primero en enviarse con el Eero incorporado mencionado anteriormente, que agrega hasta 1,000 pies cuadrados de cobertura a una red inalámbrica Eero existente. Los Echo Dots de cuarta generación, incluido el antiguo Echo Dot con reloj, recibirán una actualización de firmware que permitirá esto en los próximos meses, dijo Amazon.         Los nuevos Echo Dot saldrán a la venta en México el 20 de octubre y ya se encuentran listados en preventa.       El Echo Dot de 5ª generación tiene precio oficial de 1,299 pesos, disponible en colores azul, negro y blanco, mientras que el nuevo Echo Dot con reloj costará 1,549 pesos, con opciones en colores azul y blanco.      También el Echo Studio ya se puede adquirir en preventa en México por 4,499 pesos, a la venta también el 20 de octubre, estando disponible en colores glaciar o negro.       En el caso del Alexa Voice Remote Pro, este llegará a México por 1,099 pesos, ya está disponible en preventa, aunque será oficialmente lanzado al mercado el 16 de noviembre de 2022.  Leer también: Cuánto hay que pagar si compras el iPhone 14 a 12 meses sin intereses     Recibe todos los viernes Hello Weekend, nuestro newsletter con lo último en gastronomía, viajes, tecnología, autos, moda y belleza. Suscríbete aquí: https://www.eluniversal.com.mx/newsletters

results.actual_text: Locals Terrified by Powerful Quake in Ishikawa Pref. Newsfrom
results.plain_text: Locals Terrified by Powerful Quake in Ishikawa Pref.  Newsfrom Japan Society Shika, Ishikawa Pref., Jan. 1 (Jiji Press)--A powerful earthquake that jolted Ishikawa Prefecture on New Year's Day on Monday terrified residents in the central Japan prefecture. The quake measured 7, the highest level on Japan's seismic intensity scale, in the town of Shika. The Japan Meteorological Agency issued a huge tsunami warning to the prefecture's Noto region. A spate of aftershocks has occurred. A celebratory mood for the arrival of the new year disappeared, and relevant local governments and others are speeding up efforts to confirm the extent of damage. A 61-year-old self-employed woman was at her workplace near her home in Shika when the earthquake struck. "I couldn't keep standing, so I tried to grab the wall and pillar, and finally was able to maintain my position," she said. "It shook violently, both vertically and horizontally." [Copyright The Jiji Press, Ltd.]

results.actual_text: Australian academic moved to notorious Tehran jail Issued on: Sydney (AFP)
results.plain_text: Australian academic moved to notorious Tehran jail  Issued on:  Sydney (AFP)  An Australian academic held in Iran for more than two years has been returned to Tehran's notorious Evin prison, friends said Friday, prompting fresh concern about her wellbeing. Kylie Moore-Gilbert -- who is serving a 10-year sentence on charges of espionage -- had disappeared inside Iran's prison system a week ago, sparking frantic efforts to learn her whereabouts. "I'm relieved that the Australian government has finally managed to locate Kylie six days after she went missing," friend and fellow Middle East expert Dara Conduit told AFP. "But make no mistake: this is not a win for Kylie." Conditions at Evin are believed to be marginally better than Moore-Gilbert's previous jail at Qarchak -- a women's facility that has been blacklisted under UN human rights sanctions and is notorious for the ill-treatment of political prisoners. During a previous stint at Evin, Moore-Gilbert reported being held in restrictive conditions and needing psychiatric medications for "gravely damaged" mental health. Friends believe she is now being held at the same ward as before, a facility controlled by Iran's hardline Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps. Australia's foreign ministry has said securing her release is an "absolute priority", but was forced to admit this week that her whereabouts were unknown. "We do not accept the charges upon which Dr Moore-Gilbert was convicted, and want to see her returned to Australia as soon as possible," the ministry said after ambassador Lyndall Sachs was able to visit her in Qarchak Prison on October 19. Throughout Moore-Gilbert's internment, friends and family have become increasingly critical of what they say is Australia's ineffective diplomatic approach. According to Conduit: "Not one iota of progress has been made in her case, despite the government's assurances that Kylie's case is under control." She called Moore-Gilbert's transfer back to Evin "an utter indictment of the Australian government's failure on Kylie's case". "After 778 days, she is back at square one in the prison in which she was originally held." Moore-Gilbert was reportedly arrested at Tehran airport by the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps in September 2018 after attending a conference in Qoms. It is believed she was reported by a conference delegate or someone interviewed for her research, which focused on the Gulf -- in particular Bahrain, a crucible for competition between Iran and Saudi Arabia. She is just one of several Westerners being held in Iran on national security grounds. Negotiations with Tehran are notoriously difficult, with governments and families forced to decide if quiet discussions are less likely to antagonise captors, often against a fraught geopolitical backdrop. Iran's complex political and judicial system -- which sees hardliners, reformists and myriad state institutions vying for influence -- can make things more complex still.  © 2020 AFP
